# Mock Jutsu

> Algorithmic mock data engine that generates format-valid synthetic test data with real checksums. 390+ data types, 6 locales, zero external dependencies. Available as a Python package, CLI tool, REST API, and Apache JMeter plugin.

Mock Jutsu is an open-source project that solves a common developer problem: generating realistic, algorithmically valid test data. Unlike Faker and similar libraries, Mock Jutsu produces data that passes real validation checks — IBAN checksums (ISO 13616), Luhn algorithm for credit cards, Turkish TCKN mod-10 formula, VIN (ISO 3779), NHS number algorithm, SWIFT/BIC (ISO 9362), MRZ (ICAO 9303), and 380+ more types.

## Installation

- Python package: `pip install mockjutsu`
- Docker: `docker pull altansayan/mock-jutsu-api`
- JMeter Plugin: download JAR from GitHub releases and place in `lib/ext/`

## Quick Start

```bash
# CLI
mockjutsu generate iban --locale TR
mockjutsu generate cardnum --locale US
mockjutsu bulk 100 tckn

# Python API
from mockjutsu import generate
print(generate("iban", locale="TR"))
print(generate("cardnum", locale="US"))

# REST API
mockjutsu start-api
# GET http://localhost:8000/generate/iban?locale=TR
```

## Key Features

- 390+ data types across 49 categories
- 6 locales: TR (Turkey), UK (United Kingdom), US (United States), DE (Germany), FR (France), RU (Russia)
- Real checksum algorithms: Luhn, Verhoeff, ISO 13616, ISO 3779, Damm, MOD97
- Regulation-aware masking: PCI DSS, GDPR, KVKK, HIPAA
- Zero external dependencies (pure Python stdlib)
- REST API with 390+ endpoints
- Apache JMeter plugin with custom functions
- Bulk generation with template support

## Data Categories

- **Financial:** IBAN, credit card numbers (Visa/Mastercard/Amex), SWIFT/BIC, CVV, CVV2, bank account numbers, routing numbers, SEPA references
- **Identity (National IDs):** TCKN (Turkey), SSN (USA), NIN (UK), CPF (Brazil), PESEL (Poland), BSN (Netherlands), Aadhaar (India), DNI (Spain), SIN (Canada), TFN (Australia)
- **Healthcare:** NHS numbers, MRZ (machine-readable zone, passports), HL7 messages, FHIR resources, ICD-10 codes
- **Automotive:** VIN (ISO 3779), license plates (TR/DE/UK/US/FR/RU)
- **Crypto & Blockchain:** Bitcoin addresses, Ethereum addresses, IBAN-format crypto wallets, BIP39 mnemonics
- **Network & IT:** IPv4, IPv6, MAC addresses, domain names, URLs, JWT tokens, UUIDs
- **IoT & Sensors:** GPS coordinates, NMEA sentences, telemetry data, TLE (satellite)
- **Commerce & EDI:** UBL invoice XML, EDIFACT, barcode (EAN-13, UPC-A, QR), GS1 identifiers
- **Security & Compliance:** X.509 certificates, FIDO2 credentials, OAuth tokens, PCI DSS masked card numbers
